---
title: "Webinar Recap: Smart Manufacturing in Cambodia"
date: 2026-01-14
description: "Key takeaways from our session on automation, data, and the future of factories."
image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1581091870622-2f2de72e5f7a?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80"
categories: [Webinar, Industrial]
---

The webinar highlighted practical adoption paths for smart manufacturing in Cambodian industries, with clear first steps for students and young professionals.
